steps.title: Identify what information answers the goal
steps.content: The student wants to identify the publication year. The notes provide exactly one fact that directly answers this: “It was published in the year 1025 CE.”

steps.title: Match that information to the choices
steps.content: The correct answer states the publication year, answering the student's goal. The answers about the book's content, the author's background, or the textbook's later use draw on different information from the notes but do not identify when it was published. That confirms D is correct.
